title: simplehuman KT1105 Compact Dish Rack, Drainer for Kitchen, 360º Swivel Spout, Easy to Clean, Coated Steel Wire, Cutlery Holder, Rustproof, Black Plastic, W 37.1cm x H 17.2cm x D 32.8cm
features: you wash, I'll dry: Our compact dishrack has an innovative drainage system with a moveable spout that keeps water flowing into the sink, not onto the countertop.
versatile placement: Fits perfectly in the sink or on the countertop.
360º pivoting spout: Spout rotates 360º to drain water into the sink from any direction.
integrated handles: Large, convenient handles make moving the dishrack easy.
easy to clean: Interior wire tray lifts out for easy cleaning. Clean all parts in warm, soapy water.
description: Product Description We are in constant pursuit of more effortless paths through the daily routine. With innovative design and technology, we enable delightful simplicity. Our compact dishrack has an innovative drainage system with a moveable spout that rotates 360 degrees in any direction to keep water flowing into the sink, not onto the countertop. Fits perfectly in the sink or on the countertop. Durable, long-lasting materials won't rust or discolour. Easy To Clean Interior wire tray lifts out for easy cleaning. Clean all parts in warm, soapy water. Integrated Handles Large, convenient handles make moving the dishrack easy. A Simple Promise We use the best materials and solid engineering so our products will last in tough environments — like your home — for years. Specifications Material Plastic You Wash, I'll Dry Our compact dishrack has an innovative drainage system with a moveable spout that keeps water flowing into the sink, not onto the countertop. Versatile Placement Fits perfectly in the sink or on the countertop. 360º Pivoting Spout Spout rotates 360º to drain water into the sink from any direction. Integrated handles Large, convenient handles make moving the dishrack easy. Easy to Clean Interior wire tray lifts out for easy cleaning. Clean all parts in warm, soapy water. Coated Steel Wire Soft, coated steel wire protects dishes against chips and scratches. Rustproof Materials Durable, long-lasting materials won't rust or discolour.
